pair.title: HomeWizard Link
pair.info: This app only works with HomeWizard Link devices, for the Energy devices please use the HomeWizard app.

errors.unreachable: The light is unreachable. Is it plugged in?
errors.generic: Something went wrong while updating the device
errors.linkoffline: Your Link appears to be offline. Are both lights lit up steady blue?

settings.title: Debug
settings.subtitle: Retrieve the full configuration of your Links
settings.message: If you have any other information that you think might be useful for the developer, enter it here
settings.sent: Your configuration has been sent! You can mention the ID below on the forum, only the developer can use it to view your configuration
